checklist.entry: Pages Functions are Workers under the hood and use context.env for bindings.
Pages Functions support a subset of Worker bindings; verify the binding is listed for Pages before using it.
Durable Objects must be created as Durable Object Workers and bound to Pages; do not create and deploy a Durable Object within a Pages project.
Redeploy the Pages project after binding changes.
Record whether validation used local simulation, remote binding, preview deployment or production deployment.
Do not claim production validation from local wrangler dev output alone.
Keep route, custom domain and workers.dev behaviour explicit.
